zh.lifeSummary: 當James Peverell於大約1280年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 布雷沃德時，他的父親Richard Peverell31歲，母親Jane Elyon27歲。他於大約1307年12月14日與Margaret de Cornwall結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1314年4月享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭可瓦爾博德明。

nameMeanings.name: Peverell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Peverall
meanings: Norman, English: relationship name from Old French Peurel (Latin Piperellus), a diminutive of Old French pevre ‘pepper’ (Anglo-Norman French peivere, Latin piper), originally perhaps used as a nickname on the Continent but used as a personal name in Anglo-Norman England.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Peverell was born about 1280, in St Breward, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Peverell, was 31 and his mother, Jane Elyon, was 27. He married Margaret de Cornwall about 14 December 1307. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about April 1314, at the age of 35, and was buried in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Peverell est né environ 1280, à St Breward, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Peverell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Jane Elyon, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Cornwall environ 14 décembre 1307. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ avril 1314, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: James Peverellが約1280年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ブレワードで生まれた時，父Richard Peverellは31歳，母Jane Elyonは27歳であった。約1307年12月14日にMargaret de Cornwallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1314年4月に35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスコルンワルボドミンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: James Peverell(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 브레워드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Peverell(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Elyon(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1307년 12월 14일 Margaret de Cornwall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1314년 4월 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 보드민에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Peverell родился около 1280 г. в местности ст брюард, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Peverell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Elyon, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Cornwall около 14 декабря 1307 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около апрель 1314 г. в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания.
